name: microservices
description: Microservices: service boundaries, contract checks, distributed tracing, no cross-service DB sharing.

rules.guidance: Each service owns its data store. No service reads another service's database directly. Cross-service data access goes through the owning service's API or event.
Breaking API changes must update the published contract (OpenAPI/protobuf/AsyncAPI) before the implementation. Consumer contract tests must pass before deployment.
Propagate trace context (e.g. W3C traceparent) across all service calls. Each service must inject and extract trace headers at inbound/outbound boundaries.
Message consumers and event handlers must be idempotent. Duplicate delivery is expected in distributed systems; processing the same message twice must not corrupt state.
